title: Primal Craft
description:
Custom Temperature System
Custom Stamina System
Custom Inventory System and many more!
body:
# Primal Craft

**Master the Elements. Survive the World.**

A comprehensive survival overhaul that transforms Minecraft into a true survival experience. Manage stamina, stay hydrated, brave the elements, and conquer the wilderness.

---

## 🌟 Core Features

### 💪 Stamina System
- **Energy Management** - Every action has a cost
- **Sprint & Combat** - Manage your energy wisely
- **Rest & Recovery** - Sleep to restore stamina
- **Visual HUD** - Always know your energy level

### 💧 Thirst Mechanic  
- **Hydration Required** - Water is essential for survival
- **Bottle System** - Fill bottles at water sources
- **Environmental Effects** - Temperature affects thirst rate
- **Dehydration** - Consequences for ignoring thirst

### 🌡️ Temperature System
- **Biome-Based** - Different climates require adaptation
- **Dynamic Weather** - Storms, rain, and snow affect temperature
- **Armor Protection** - Choose gear for your environment
- **Shelter System** - Buildings provide protection
- **Health Effects** - Extreme temperatures are dangerous

### 🌪️ Wind & Weather
- **Dynamic Wind** - Affects movement and projectiles
- **Weather Patterns** - Realistic weather cycles
- **Visual Effects** - See wind direction and strength
- **Strategic Gameplay** - Use weather to your advantage

### 🎮 Quality of Life
- **Advanced HUDs** - Stamina, thirst, temperature, and more
- **Biome Notifications** - Know when you enter new biomes
- **Weather Alerts** - Get notified of weather changes
- **Animated Chat** - Enhanced chat with typing indicators
- **Login Streaks** - Track your daily playtime

---

## 📦 Content

### ⚒️ Tools & Weapons
- Pink Garnet toolset (Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, Hoe, Hammer)
- Obsidian Axe
- Tomahawk (Throwable)
- Spectre Staff
- Kaupen Bow
- Chisel

### 🛡️ Armor & Equipment
- Pink Garnet Armor (Full set with trim support)
- Pink Garnet Horse Armor
- Pajama Set

### 🧱 Blocks & Building
- 40+ custom blocks
- Pink Garnet ore variants (Overworld, Nether, End, Deepslate)
- Driftwood tree set (logs, planks, leaves, sapling)
- Custom crafting tables for all wood types
- Decorative blocks and furniture
- Growth Chamber (advanced farming)

### 🌿 Plants & Food
- Cauliflower crop
- Honey Berry bush
- New food items

### ✨ Other Features
- Custom particles and sounds
- New enchantments and effects
- Custom villager trades
- Loot table modifications
- World generation enhancements

---

## 🎯 Survival Overhaul

Primal Craft completely reimagines survival gameplay:

### Hunger System Rebalanced
- More realistic hunger drain
- Food provides varied saturation
- Exhaustion from activities
- Better food variety balance

### Sleep System Enhanced
- Sleep restores stamina
- Day/night cycle impacts gameplay
- Threat detection improvements

### Environmental Hazards
- Temperature exposure damage
- Dehydration effects
- Weather-based challenges
- Biome-specific dangers

---

## 🖥️ Requirements

- **Minecraft:** 1.21, 1.21.1, or 1.21.11
- **Loader:** Fabric
- **Dependencies:** Fabric API (Required)

---

## 📚 Documentation

Full wiki with detailed guides:
- Installation & Setup
- Complete feature list
- System mechanics explained
- Configuration options
- Multiplayer setup
- Troubleshooting

**[View Full Wiki →](https://github.com/NotKimDog/KimDog-SMP-1.21.X/wiki)**

---

## 🎮 Gameplay Experience

Primal Craft is designed for players who want:
- ✅ Challenging survival mechanics
- ✅ Environmental interaction
- ✅ Resource management
- ✅ Immersive gameplay
- ✅ Hardcore mode enhancement
- ✅ Multiplayer-friendly systems

**Perfect for:** Hardcore survivors, SMP servers, content creators, challenge seekers

---

## 🛠️ Compatibility

### Tested & Compatible
- Works in singleplayer and multiplayer
- Server-friendly (sync all systems)
- Performance optimized
- No major conflicts reported

### Multiplayer Features
- All systems sync between players
- Server-side configuration
- Admin commands (Vanish, Freecam)
- Balanced for PvP and PvE

---

## 📊 Stats

- **40+** Custom Blocks
- **75+** Custom Items
- **15+** Gameplay Systems
- **50+** Features & Mechanics
- **100%** Data-Driven (All content auto-generated)

---

## 🚀 Get Started

1. **Download** the latest version
2. **Install** Fabric Loader & Fabric API
3. **Add** Primal Craft to your mods folder
4. **Launch** and survive!

**Ready to master the elements?**
